title: elatostema ranongense var. ranongense
intro: Elatostema ranongense var. ranongense is a plant species in the Urticaceae family, commonly known as the 'Ranong creeper'. It is native to Southeast Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The plant's health benefits include the potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Elatostema ranongense var. ranongense can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and has also been used in folk remedies to treat various ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
